testcase.name: loginInvalidPasswordReturns401

exists books cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists categories cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists loan_details cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists loans cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists roles cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_roles cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table book_categories ( book_id bigint not null, category_id bigint not null, primary key (book_id, category_id) ) Hibernate: create table books ( published_date date, stock integer check (stock>=0), created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), version bigint, author varchar(255), description TEXT, isbn varchar(255) unique, title varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table categories ( id bigint generated by default as identity, color varchar(255), description varchar(255), name varchar(255), primary key (id), unique (name) ) Hibernate: create table loan_details ( renewal_count integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, loan_id bigint unique, itemcondition varchar(255), notes TEXT, returned_by varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table loans ( actual_return_date date, expected_return_date date, loan_date date, book_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','ACTIVE','RETURNED','OVERDUE')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table roles ( id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(255) not null unique check (name in ('ROLE_ADMIN','ROLE_MANAGER','ROLE_USER')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table user_roles ( role_id bigint not null, user_id bigint not null, primary key (role_id, user_id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( enabled boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255), password varchar(255), username varchar(255), primary key (id), unique (username), unique (email) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists book_categories add constraint FKrg2xlmc92mm2y5b1wmhd2g0y0 foreign key (category_id) references categories Hibernate: alter table if ('PENDING','ACTIVE','RETURNED','OVERDUE')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table roles ( id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(255) not null unique check (name in
